name: First Southern Bank
description_short: Community bank serving Southern Georgia and West Central Florida since 1907, offering personal and business banking with 5 branches and a 5-Star Bauer Financial rating.
description_long:
First Southern Bank was chartered on June 19, 1907, as The Patterson Bank in Patterson, Georgia, with $15,000 in capital stock. Over 117 years, it has grown into a regional community bank with 5 branches serving Southern Georgia and West Central Florida. The bank relocated to its current Highway 84 location in Patterson in 1975 and has maintained continuous operations in the communities it serves. As of early 2025, First Southern Bank is undergoing acquisition by Community First Credit Union, marking a significant transition in its organizational structure.

First Southern Bank offers comprehensive personal and business banking services including multiple checking account options, personal and commercial loan products, business solutions for sole proprietors and corporations, credit cards with UChoose Rewards, online banking with 24/7 account access, and bill payment services. They provide specialized commercial lending expertise and fraud protection guidance. The bank operates physical branches in Waycross, Patterson, Jesus, Blackshear, and Bradenton (Florida), with a newly opened Blackshear location and scholarship programs for 2027 graduates in Ware, Pierce, and Wayne Counties.

First Southern Bank distinguishes itself through its 5-Star Superior rating from Bauer Financial (as of March 2025), its deep community roots spanning over a century, and its positioning as a "true community bank" with a stated mission to provide service superior to competitors. The bank actively engages in community support and disaster response, as evidenced by Hurricane Idalia preparedness communications. Their transition to Community First Credit Union suggests an effort to expand resources and member benefits within the cooperative banking sector.

While First Southern Bank maintains solid credentials and longevity, potential customers should note that the institution is mid-acquisition by Community First Credit Union, which may result in service changes, branch consolidation, or product modifications. The bank's 5-branch footprint is geographically limited to specific counties in Georgia and one Florida location, making it inaccessible to many consumers outside these regions. Customers should verify current hours and services during the transition period, particularly given recent winter weather closures. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Fraud protection and scam awareness guidance
Scholarship programs for high school graduates
pros: 117+ years of continuous community banking operation since 1907
24/7 online banking and bill payment services
UChoose Rewards credit card program for personal and business use
Commercial lending expertise with dedicated business solutions
Active community engagement including scholarship programs for students
Multiple branch locations across Georgia and Florida
cons: Limited geographic footprint (5 branches only in select Georgia and Florida counties)
Currently undergoing acquisition by Community First Credit Union with uncertain service implications
Subject to seasonal branch closures due to severe weather (winter 2025, Hurricane Idalia 2023)
No mention of competitive interest rates, fees, or account minimums on website
Inaccessible to consumers outside Ware, Pierce, Wayne, Glynn, Charlton counties (GA) and Manatee County (FL)
best_for: Small business owners and sole proprietors in Southern Georgia seeking community-focused commercial lending
Residents of Waycross, Patterson, Jesup, Blackshear (GA) and Bradenton (FL) areas seeking local relationship banking
Customers valuing 100+ year banking institution history and community roots over large national chains
High school graduates in Ware, Pierce, and Wayne Counties eligible for FSB scholarship programs
diagnosis: First Southern Bank is best for customers in Southern Georgia (Waycross, Patterson, Jesup, Blackshear areas) and West Central Florida (Bradenton) who prioritize community banking relationships and value institutional longevity. However, the ongoing acquisition by Community First Credit Union creates uncertainty about future services, products, and fees, making it essential to clarify transition details before opening accounts.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Community bank serving Southern Georgia and West Central Florida since 1907, offering personal and business banking with 5 branches and 5-Star rating.
